Buena atención pero los sanitarios permanecen cerrados y sin posibilidad de habilitarlos durante la noche.

(Translated by Google)
Good service but the restrooms remain closed and cannot be opened overnight.

reviews.comment:
La atención es a pedal. Y la nafta que venden es dudosa, no rinde como la que se carga en otros ACA del país.

(Translated by Google)
The service is pedal-powered. And the gas they sell is dubious; it doesn't last as long as the gas you get at other ACAs in the country.

reviews.comment:

Y suelen tener problemas de abastecimiento.

And they often have supply problems.

reviews.comment:
Estacion de Servicio en la localidad de Tinogasta, Catamarca.- Es el unico lugar donde se puede tomar un cafe en ese pueblo.- Esta siempre abierto.- Buena atencion.- Frente de la plaza

(Translated by Google)
Gas station in the town of Tinogasta, Catamarca. It's the only place to get coffee in town. It's always open. Good service. Across from the town square.
